attributes.readMe:
# BrazilianPlantCard ## Summary The `BrazilianPlantCard` is a card definition that represents information about a Brazilian plant. It contains fields for the common name, scientific name, description, habitat, conservation status, uses, images, and growth conditions of the plant. ## Import ```gts import { BrazilianPlantCard } from 'https://realms-staging.stack.cards/experiments/brazilianPlants'; ``` ## Usage as a Field You can use the `BrazilianPlantCard` as a field within a consuming card or field definition: ```gts @field brazilianPlant = linksTo(BrazilianPlantCard); ``` ## Template Usage To use the `BrazilianPlantCard` within a template, you can delegate to its fields: ```hbs

<@fields.commonName />

<@fields.scientificName />

<@fields.description />

Habitat

<@fields.habitat />

Conservation Status

<@fields.conservationStatus />

Uses

<@fields.uses />

Growth Conditions

<@fields.growthConditions />

Images

<@fields.images @format="embedded" />
```
